author: .just_kk
content:
Hey everyone!

May I ask to take a look on https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/774 ?
That is an engine-api change required to support sparse-blobpools ([EIP-8070](https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8070)). 

PR introduces:
1. `engine_getBlobsV4`: provides the mechanism for the CL to request partial blobs data from the the EL's blobpool
2. `engine_forkchoiceupdatedv4`: updated with the column custody field to notify EL about CL's custody column set

cc <@1057495364564946944>
